headline: United Rentals Expands AI Equipment Tool Into the ChatGPT Space
summary: URI brings its AI-powered Equipment Agent to ChatGPT to simplify equipment selection for its customers.

raw.headline: United Rentals Expands AI Equipment Tool Into the ChatGPT Space
raw.summary: URI brings its AI-powered Equipment Agent to ChatGPT to simplify equipment selection for its customers.

headline: United Rentals Expands Digital Customer Experience with Equipment Agent Launch in ChatGPT
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., May 20, 2026--United Rentals (NYSE: URI) today announced the expansion of its AI-powered Equipment Agent to be accessible in ChatGPT, giving customers a faster, more intuitive way to identify equipment solutions for complex jobsites and time-sensitive projects. The launch marks the first equipment rental application available in the ChatGPT store, expanding how customers can access United Rentals' expertise within the digital tools they already use every day.
